etymology.interpretation: The character combines åḟḞ(åḟḞ) (nÃỲ, "contrary") and æỲ (æỲ ) (qiÃ n, "yawn; lack") to convey the idea of inversely lacking something. The juxtaposition of these components suggests a physical or situational inversion of availability.
